query: target_workspace/mcu_firmware/main.c reports unsupported kLPI2C_4PinUnidirectional on i.MX93. Which LPI2C configuration and driver files should be checked?
description: The retriever should find LPI2C manual context and SDK driver sources for the unsupported pin mode.

query: Yocto BitBake reports no provider or missing recipe for u-boot-imx_2023.04.bb during BSP build. Which recipe or Yocto development guide should be retrieved?
description: The retriever should identify the missing U-Boot recipe and Yocto debugging documentation.

category: Device Tree and BSP Integration Errors
query: dtc syntax error in imx93-11x11-evk.dts after adding an lpi2c2 node. Which DTS file and I2C board documentation should be checked?
description: The retriever should find the DTS source and board-level I2C documentation.

query: UART validation shows LPI2C initialization mismatch after build passes. Which board I2C interface document and LPI2C driver files should be retrieved?
description: The retriever should support runtime fault localization by returning board interface and driver context.
